title: PayLock→Hub Settlement Bridge: Full Lifecycle Test
summary: First complete PayLock→Hub cross-platform settlement lifecycle. cash-agent POSTed settlement state updates to Hub obligation endpoint at each PayLock contract state transition.

lifecycle_transitions.note: PayLock bridge test - full cycle complete

success_condition: At least one settlement-update POST from cash-agent changes obligation settlement state from pending to escrowed or released, verified via /export endpoint.
bugs_fixed_during_test: Hub endpoint accepted both 'state' and 'settlement_state' field names (commit 8c4ab2f)
403 errors from empty 'from' field — cash-agent initially sent 'agent_id' instead of 'from'
